summary.next_direction: keep building intraday override supervision objects and delay promotion until lawful minute-level support exists

retained_rows.why: proxy cleanly isolates retained severe intraday-collapse failures and does not fire on broader watch-only cases
retained_rows.next_use: future intraday emergency-exit grammar once minute-level lawful support exists

blocked_rows.why: proxy depends on execution-day path information and therefore cannot be translated into current lawful EOD replay

interpretation: V1.28V freezes the first intraday-collapse-override supervision proto.
It is worth keeping as a future intraday governance object, but it is explicitly blocked from current EOD replay promotion.
